faq.title: Everything you need to know
faq.subtitle: Can't find what you're looking for? Write to us at hello@reqsai.com

items.q: How does ReqsAI work during a live meeting?
items.a: ReqsAI connects to your meeting audio (Zoom, Meet, Teams) or a recording file. While the analyst talks with the client, the AI engine transcribes in real time, detects implicit requirements, and suggests questions to reveal hidden edge cases. When the meeting ends, the system automatically generates User Stories with Gherkin acceptance criteria ready for review.

items.q: Is my data secure? How is it isolated between organizations?
items.a: We use a schema-per-tenant isolation architecture: each organization has its own completely separate database schema. No data crosses between tenants under any circumstances. RAG vectors are also stored per tenant. We comply with enterprise security standards and can provide technical isolation documentation to your legal team during Enterprise onboarding.

items.q: Do I need to install any software or plugin?
items.a: No. ReqsAI runs 100% in the cloud from the browser. For live meetings we offer a recording bot that automatically joins your Zoom or Meet room — nothing to install on your computer. For existing recordings, simply upload the audio or video file directly from the platform.

items.q: What tools does ReqsAI integrate with?
items.a: The Startup plan includes integration with Jira (Cloud and Server) and Azure DevOps. Approved User Stories export directly as issues with the correct fields pre-filled. We also offer webhooks for custom integrations in the Enterprise plan. Coming soon: Linear, Notion, and GitHub Issues.

items.q: Can I analyze recordings from previous meetings?
items.a: Yes. In addition to live mode, you can upload MP3, MP4, WAV files or import from Google Drive and OneDrive. The engine processes the audio, identifies requirements, and generates the same structured output as a live session. Ideal for teams that want to feed historical context back into the RAG system.

items.q: How accurate is the generated Gherkin? How much editing is needed?
items.a: In sessions with good audio quality and structured conversations, analysts report an average of under 15 minutes of editing per session. The system learns from your project history via RAG, improving accuracy with each session. All stories go through a review and approval flow before export, so the team always has final control.

items.q: What languages does the AI support?
items.a: The transcription and analysis engine natively supports Spanish, English, and Portuguese — the three most common languages in LATAM tech teams. Gherkin can be generated in whichever language you prefer. The platform UI is available in Spanish and English.

items.q: How does the 14-day trial period work?
items.a: When you sign up, your account is in Trial status with full access to the Startup plan for 14 days — no credit card required. You can process real meetings, invite your team, and export to Jira. At the end of the period we notify you in advance and you can continue with a paid plan or switch to the free Starter plan without losing your data.

features.title: Everything your team needs to elicit requirements perfectly
features.subtitle: From the meeting to a sprint-ready backlog, without friction.
features.live_desc: Real-time prompts during client meetings to surface hidden edge cases and logic gaps before the call ends.
features.gherkin_desc: Structured Given-When-Then acceptance criteria generated instantly from meeting transcripts, ready to export.
